boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the privacy operator execute the requested data release, deletion, transfer, or sharing action? Focus: customer portability file requested through unverified channel.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Control record closes exact boundary for execution.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No narrow source defect remains open.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Ownership and format approval match current and exact.

critical_features_preserved: account ownership and portability format approval match
final_answer: Source records close the exact action boundary. The control record confirms account ownership and portability format approval match for the customer portability request, and policy allows execution only when the boundary is closed. Communication-boundary language is contextual only. Action may proceed.
